---
title: "Dual-Dataset Bias Mitigation Pipeline"
author: "Term Project"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

## Phase 1: Data Preparation (Both Datasets)

```{r}
source('R/01_data_preparation.R')
```

### Dataset 1 — Synthetic Loan/Hiring Data
- File: `data/final_bias_hiring_dataset.csv`
- Protected attribute: `Gender` (Male/Female text -> 0/1)
- Target: `Final_Decision` (Selected/Rejected -> 0/1)

### Dataset 2 — AI Hiring (Kaggle)
- File: `data/data.csv`
- Protected attribute: `Gender` (0/1)
- Target: `HiringDecision` (0/1)

## Phase 2: EDA & Bias Detection (Side-by-Side)

```{r}
source('R/02_eda_bias_detection.R')
readr::read_csv('outputs/eda/disparate_impact_summary.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics('outputs/eda/hiring_rates_by_gender.png')
```

## Phase 3: Modeling with Reweighting (Both Datasets)

```{r}
source('R/03_modeling_reweighting.R')
readr::read_csv('outputs/model_metrics_dual_dataset.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## Phase 4: Fairness Evaluation (Comparative)

```{r}
source('R/04_fairness_evaluation.R')
readr::read_csv('outputs/fairness/fairness_metrics.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
readr::read_csv('outputs/fairness/bias_reduction.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
```

## Phase 5: XAI Analysis (Both Datasets)

```{r}
source('R/05_xai_explainability.R')
list.files('outputs/xai')
```

## Phase 6: Error Analysis & Cross-Dataset Comparison

```{r}
metrics <- readr::read_csv('outputs/model_metrics_dual_dataset.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
fair <- readr::read_csv('outputs/fairness/fairness_metrics.csv', show_col_types = FALSE)
list(metrics = metrics, fairness = fair)
```

The same DALC pipeline is validated on both datasets with per-dataset performance and fairness reporting.
